name: Evervault Card
description: A card with an animated encrypted-text effect where random characters shuffle and resolve on hover, inspired by Evervault's design.
whenToUse: Use for security-themed sections, encryption showcases, or any card where you want a mysterious/techy character scramble effect.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to display with the encryption effect

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the card
